# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

server.properties:
  listeners: PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092, JMXIMQPS://0.0.0.0:1099
  jmx.imqps.address=0.0.0.0:1099
  jmx.endpoint.authenticator.classes=org.apache.kafka.jmx.DefaultJmxEndpointAuthenticator
  jmx.endpoint.port=1099
  jmx.metrics.contextService.address=service:jmx:rmi:///jndi/rmi//localhost:1099/jmxrmi
  kafka.rest.host.whitelist=*
  kafka.rest.port=9999
